meta.question: What views are defined under the TMT-APS-SE view package?
meta.finalAnswer:
There are **481 views** defined under the TMT-APS-SE view package, organized into the following sub-packages:

| Sub-Package | View Count |
|-------------|------------|
| TMT-APS DDD | 273 |
| TMT-APS Use Cases | 138 |
| TMT ICD: APS to M1CS | 28 |
| TMT-APS Model Information | 19 |
| TMT-APS Requirements Flow-down | 8 |
| Generated ICD: APS to M1CS | 6 |
| TMT-APS Analysis | 4 |
| TMT-APS L3 Requirements | 3 |
| (root level) | 1 |
| _18_0_5_c0402fd... (metadata) | 1 |

The majority of views (273) are under the **TMT-APS DDD** (Domain Decomposition) sub-package, followed by **TMT-APS Use Cases** with 138 views.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS-SE"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the TMT-APS-SE package. Now need to explore its owned elements to find all views defined under it.
The initial ownedElement query returned only problems/dependencies, not views. Need to explore deeper - views may be nested deeper in the hierarchy or accessed via different property path.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS-SE")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found many views with "APS" in the name. Need to filter to only those directly under TMT-APS-SE package by checking the URI path contains TMT-APS-SE but not nested deeper sub-packages.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?view), "TMT-APS-SE::") && NOT(CONTAINS(STR(?view), "TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS")) && NOT(CONTAINS(STR(?view), "TMT-APS-SE::_")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?view), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(?view) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?view), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::"))
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPackage (COUNT(?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?view), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::"))
  BIND(STR(REPLACE(STR(?view), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::", "")) AS ?path)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(?path, "::") AS ?subPackage)
}
GROUP BY ?subPackage
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)
